backlog-items.title: Maintenance
backlog-items.description: Default epic for maintenance and operational tasks

backlog-items.title: Implement user authentication flow
backlog-items.description: Add login, logout, and session management for all user roles

backlog-items.title: Dashboard chart not rendering on Firefox
backlog-items.description: The pie chart on the dashboard page shows a blank area on Firefox 120+

backlog-items.title: Update project dependencies to latest versions
backlog-items.description: Run npm audit and upgrade all outdated packages

backlog-items.title: Add export to CSV for backlog items
backlog-items.description: Users should be able to export the current filtered backlog view as a CSV file

backlog-items.title: Pagination resets when switching tabs
backlog-items.description: Navigating away from backlog and returning resets the page to 1

backlog-items.title: Write unit tests for permission service
backlog-items.description: Cover all role-check branches in PermissionService

backlog-items.title: Implement notification preferences
backlog-items.description: Allow users to configure email and in-app notification settings

backlog-items.title: Create ticket dialog does not clear on cancel
backlog-items.description: Reopening the create dialog after cancelling shows stale form data

backlog-items.title: Set up CI pipeline for automated testing
backlog-items.description: Configure GitHub Actions to run test:ci and test:mock on every PR

backlog-items.title: Create onboarding wizard for new users
backlog-items.description: Step-by-step guide that walks new users through project setup

backlog-items.title: Sidebar menu flickers on page load
backlog-items.description: The sidebar briefly shows all items then collapses to the correct set

backlog-items.title: Translate all labels to French
backlog-items.description: Complete the fr.json translation file for all existing i18n keys

backlog-items.title: Add dark mode support
backlog-items.description: Implement theme toggle using EuiThemeService for dark mode

backlog-items.title: Member role dropdown shows wrong default
backlog-items.description: When editing a member role the dropdown pre-selects VIEWER instead of current role

backlog-items.title: Clean up unused CSS classes
backlog-items.description: Remove dead CSS from legacy components after the portfolio redesign

backlog-items.title: Q1 2026 Feature Roadmap
backlog-items.description: Epic grouping all planned features for Q1 2026 delivery

backlog-items.title: Implement bulk ticket status update
backlog-items.description: Allow selecting multiple tickets and changing their status in one action

backlog-items.title: Search filter does not reset on project switch
backlog-items.description: Switching projects keeps the previous search term active

backlog-items.title: Design rate limiting middleware
backlog-items.description: Implement token bucket rate limiter for all public API endpoints

backlog-items.title: 502 errors on concurrent POST requests
backlog-items.description: Under load the gateway returns 502 for roughly 5% of POST requests

backlog-items.title: Document all API endpoints in OpenAPI spec
backlog-items.description: Create a comprehensive openapi.yaml covering every route

backlog-items.title: Add request/response logging
backlog-items.description: Log all incoming requests and outgoing responses with correlation IDs

backlog-items.title: Auth token refresh returns 401 instead of new token
backlog-items.description: The refresh endpoint rejects valid refresh tokens after server restart

backlog-items.title: Migrate database schema to v2
backlog-items.description: Run migration scripts to update the schema for the new membership model

backlog-items.title: Implement webhook delivery system
backlog-items.description: Allow projects to register webhook URLs and receive event notifications

backlog-items.title: API v2 Redesign
backlog-items.description: Epic for the complete API v2 overhaul including breaking changes

backlog-items.title: CORS headers missing on OPTIONS preflight
backlog-items.description: Browser preflight requests fail because OPTIONS responses lack CORS headers
